chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1249 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on withdrawal statement dated 22.04.2019 2. For hearing of CMA No.6594/2018 3. For hearing of main case 07-12-2023 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he has already filed statement not pressing the petition and for availing his remedy before the relevant forum. Accordingly, in view of above, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
